title: Invalid cast from type ‘std::__cxx11::basic_string<char>’ to type ‘QData’ {aka ‘long unsigned int’}

features.name: struct with string members returned from function with queue assignment
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with string members, where a function returns an instance of this struct with members assigned from queue elements using string concatenation or other operations that confuse type inference
features.snippet:
typedef struct { string positive; string negative; } filter_expression_parts_t;
function filter_expression_parts_t get_parts(string raw); string parts[$]; parts = raw.split("-"); return '{positive: parts[0], negative: parts[1]}; endfunction

features.name: queue of strings assigned to struct string members
features.description: Code should include a queue of strings where elements are assigned to struct members of type string, forming a struct literal return value
features.snippet: string parts[$]; parts = raw.split("-"); return '{positive: parts[0], negative: parts[1]};
